headline: Trump Declared The Iran Ceasefire 'Over': These 7 Energy Stocks Have Been Cashing In Ever Since
summary: Crude is up 10% since Trump declared the Iran deal over. But refiners — not drillers — lead the 7 best-performing energy stocks. Here's why.

headline: Texas Pacific Land’s Quarterly Earnings Preview: What You Need to Know
